name: Chuck Leavell
abstract: Charles Alfred Leavell (born April 28, 1952) is an American musician. A member of the Allman Brothers Band throughout their commercial zenith in the 1970s, he subsequently became a founding member of the band Sea Level.

concerts.label: Dan Hicks and His Hot Licks

about_quotes.speaker: Mike Davis
about_quotes.evidence: I mean in the M.D., who was Chuck Leavell, who is a keyboard player, he couldn’t read music either.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mike Davis interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 1, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Tim Ries
about_quotes.evidence: And Chuck Leavell is the musical director. So he’ll look at okay the last time we were in this city we did these songs...
about_quotes.doc_title: Tim Ries interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 19, 2022
